education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

experience.description: Developed a role-play, farming game. Responsibilities included character finite state machine and interaction, item, inventory, farming, trading, and NPC dialog systems. Solo developed crafting, placeable objects, item conversion, HP, stamina, damage, enemies, and scene consistency (saving system).
Created a 2D UI-focused quiz game using Unity UI and C#. Implemented question panel, clickable answers, score tracking, correct answer unveiling, and game restart functionality.

Developed a 2D Mario-like tile-based game using Unity tile and tilemap system. Features included player character with score, lives, monster interaction, obstacles, and a multi-stage level progression with state preservation.
